mission.title: longhorn: [FEATURE] Add support for ReadWriteOncePod access mode
mission.description: [FEATURE] Add support for ReadWriteOncePod access mode. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current longhorn deployment
steps.description:
Verify your longhorn version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn
helm list -n longhorn 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working longhorn installation.

steps.title: Review longhorn configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant longhorn configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn
kubectl get configmap -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=longhorn
```
## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe (👍 if you like this request)

ReadWriteOncePod is another Kubernetes access mode that restricts access to just a single pod on a single node at any given time.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [FEATURE] Add support for ReadWriteOncePod access mode

The automation skeleton PR
```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: vol1
  namespace: default
spec:
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteOncePod
  storageClassName: longhorn
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 2Gi
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn
kubectl get events -n longhorn --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[FEATURE] Add support for ReadWriteOncePod access mode" is functioning correctly.

codeSnippets:
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: vol1
  namespace: default
spec:
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteOncePod
  storageClassName: longhorn
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 2Gi

# k get pv
NAME                                       CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   RECLAIM POLICY   STATUS   CLAIM          STORAGECLASS   VOLUMEATTRIBUTESCLASS   REASON   AGE
pvc-4683395c-3e17-4458-8e0a-7ee5f6fc113c   2Gi        RWOP           Delete           Bound    default/vol1   longhorn       <unset>                          37s
root@ip-10-0-1-150:/home/ubuntu# k get pvc
NAME   STATUS   VOLUME                                     CAPACITY   ACCESS MODES   STORAGECLASS   VOLUMEATTRIBUTESCLASS   AGE
vol1   Bound    pvc-4683395c-3e17-4458-8e0a-7ee5f6fc113c   2Gi        RWOP           longhorn       <unset>                 44s

# kl get volume pvc-4683395c-3e17-4458-8e0a-7ee5f6fc113c -o yaml | grep access
  accessMode: rwo
